description: Example test cases for benchmarking a skill

test_cases.name: basic-functionality
test_cases.description: Tests basic functionality with simple input
test_cases.input: Sample input text for the skill to process

assertions.name: output-not-empty
assertions.description: Output should not be empty string

assertions.name: output-type-correct
assertions.description: Output should be string or JSON object

test_cases.name: edge-case-handling
test_cases.description: Tests how skill handles edge cases
test_cases.input: Edge case: empty input, special characters, very long text
test_cases.expected_output: Skill should handle gracefully without crashing

assertions.name: handles-edge-cases
assertions.description: Should handle edge cases without error

assertions.name: graceful-degradation
assertions.description: Should provide meaningful output or error message
